channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla's Delivery Results Support Continued Pessimism
Tesla (TSLA) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) closed at $402.9 in the latest trading session, marking a -4.02% move from the prior day.

item.title: When It Comes to Analyst Ratings, Tesla Stock Is No SpaceX
item.description: Morgan Stanley, Goldman Sachs, BofA, RBC, Wells Fargo, Bernstein, and UBS are among the firms that launched coverage—and all except one are Buy. Tesla has a 40% Buy-rating ratio. Tesla’s target values the company at about 15 times estimated 2027 sales of $121 billion.

item.title: ChargePoint adds 200+ new EV charging ports in the Southeast
item.description: ChargePoint is expanding its partnership with charge point operator Optimus Energy Solutions to install more than 200 new public EV charging ports across the southeastern US.

item.title: Exclusive: Tesla Cybercab Includes More Powerful FSD Hardware
item.description: Exclusive: Tesla Cybercab Includes More Powerful FSD Hardware

item.title: Veteran Bank Revamps Tesla Stock Price Target on Potential SpaceX Merger
item.description: Tesla Gets Higher Price Target as RBC Floats Potential SpaceX Merger

item.title: Tesla shares the 216-page 2025 Impact Report: Highlights and what you need to know
item.description: submitted by /u/JaanatEVuniverse [link] [comments]

item.title: Stocks making big moves yesterday: Boeing, Lincoln Financial Group, Dell, NN, and Tesla
item.description: Check out the companies making headlines yesterday:

item.title: Tesla app update makes Robotaxi ownership make a lot more sense
item.description: A recent Tesla app update, released last week (4.58.5), gives visibility on whether a vehicle is navigating in its semi-autonomous mode or being drive by a human driver. The updated app now displays a live “Self-Driving” indicator in bright blue text directly beneath the vehicle’s speed readout ...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Service Starts Testing in New Orleans
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi Service Starts Testing in New Orleans

item.title: Tesla's Self-Driving Story Faces New Test
item.description: Texas manslaughter charge puts FSD claims under pressure

item.title: Ford Vs. Tesla: 2 American Icons With Upside, Which to Buy
item.description: Ford (NYSE:F) and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) just closed the books on Q1 2026. Ford leaned on trucks, fleet software, and a raised outlook. Tesla leaned on margin recovery, FSD subscriptions, and a roadmap stuffed with robots.

item.title: JPMorgan on SpaceX-Tesla merger: strategically sound but overly complex
item.description: Investing.com -- JPMorgan analyst Rajat Gupta said Tuesday a potential merger between SpaceX and Tesla appears strategically sound but faces substantial regulatory and governance obstacles.

item.title: Elon Musk and Tesla announce serious AI changes for workers
item.description: Tesla has spent months pushing employees to use artificial intelligence as aggressively as possible. The company was tracking which engineers consumed the most compute, running internal promotions, and encouraging staff to experiment freely with AI tools. Leadership sent company-wide emails urgin...

item.title: Tesla Updates App With New AI 'Opticaster,' Smart Breaker Support & Smart Charging
item.description: Tesla Updates App With New AI 'Opticaster,' Smart Breaker Support & Smart Charging

item.title: Rivian Learns the Power of the Hot Stock Force: Selling It
item.description: The EV maker sold into a 19% rally, straight from the Tesla playbook, which might be the most bullish thing about it

item.title: Tesla launches startup challenge to scale Giga Berlin battery cells
item.description: Tesla is opening the doors of its Gigafactory Berlin-Brandenburg to outside startups through a new “Cell Giga Challenge,” inviting them to pilot technologies inside its live battery cell production line. The program comes as Tesla ramps 4680 cell output at Grünheide toward a planned 18 GWh of ann...

item.title: Tesla Expands Robotaxi Service to Miami
item.description: The launch adds another test market for Tesla's autonomous ride-hailing push.

item.title: Tesla Price Target Boosted by Potential SpaceX Takeover Premium, RBC Says
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) higher price target includes a premium from a potential all-stock acquisition scenari

item.title: Jeff Bezos 'Made All of Our Lives So Much Better,' Says Billionaire Investor Tim Draper
item.description: Venture capitalist Tim Draper is best known for his focus on Bitcoin these days. Past investments in companies like Hotmail, Skype, Tesla and SpaceX helped grow his returns over the years. In a 2025 Benzinga interview, Draper credited Amazon.com Inc...

item.title: SpaceX Draws Bullish Analyst Views as Musk's Rocket Company Joins Nasdaq 100
item.description: SpaceX (SPCX) drew bullish views from Wall Street as the rocket and satellite company joined the Nas

item.title: Tesla's Delivery Numbers Blew Past Estimates. So Why Isn't the Stock Rallying?
item.description: Tesla's second-quarter delivery numbers were far higher than analyst expectations, but that wasn't enough to give the stock a boost.

item.title: Tesla’s $500 Billion Question: Can Growth Justify the Valuation?
item.description: The headline number cuts through the noise around Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) faster than any product roadmap can. It is the price tag investors have chosen to hang on the entire enterprise, and Q1 finally gave the bulls a fresh reason to defend it. The Number Tesla’s market capitalization sits at roughl...

item.title: Ex-Tesla Optimus scientist unveils European humanoid robot startup
item.description: A scientist who worked on Tesla’s Optimus humanoid robot is now building a rival of his own — in Europe, not Silicon Valley. Rémi Cadène, co-founder and CEO of Paris-based startup UMA, unveiled plans for a lightweight humanoid robot called Northstar and says the company is already talking to 50 p...

item.title: Forget EVs — Tesla’s Biggest Growth Engine Is Hiding in Plain Sight
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) keeps proving that investors can become fixated on the wrong metric. Every quarterly delivery report sparks debate over electric vehicle demand, price cuts, and market share. Its recent expansion of the Cybercab robotaxi service into Miami only reinforced that narrative, with ...

item.title: Tesla Launches Model 3 Air Mattress for Car Camping
item.description: Tesla Launches Model 3 Air Mattress for Car Camping

item.title: RBC raises Tesla price target on potential SpaceX deal speculation (TSLA)
item.description: RBC increases target to $500RBC Capital has raised its price target for Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to $500 from $475, reflecting both a revised standalone valuation and an additional premium linked to a potential merger with SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX). Analyst Tom Narayan said the updated target incorporates ...

item.title: Why Analysts Prefer SpaceX to Tesla Stock
item.description: Wall Street analysts prefer SpaceX. to Tesla among Elon Musk’s publicly traded companies. Morgan Stanley, Goldman Sachs, BofA, RBC, Wells Fargo, Bernstein, UBS, were among the firms launching coverage, and only one rates the stock a Hold—the rest are Buy.

item.title: How Time Re-Prices Tesla Stock For Patient Investors
item.description: The premium you see on the sticker today is not the price you are really paying once you account for the earnings growth analysts expect.

item.title: Tesla stock target lifted at RBC on potential SpaceX merger
item.description: Investing.com -- RBC Capital lifted its price target on Tesla to $500 from $475 in a note on Tuesday, incorporating a premium tied to a potential combination with SpaceX, while also updating its standalone intrinsic valuation of the electric vehicle maker.

item.title: Tech Weekly: Tesla's surge, robot footballers target glory
item.description: STORY: From Tesla driving up sales to robot footballers competing in their own competition... This is Tech Weekly. :: Tech Weekly Tesla beat Wall Street estimates when it posted record second-quarter deliveries.

item.title: Tesla Giga Berlin launches "Cell Giga Challenge," offering startups a paid pilot on its 4680 line
item.description: submitted by /u/JaanatEVuniverse [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla under fire for hiking prices in South Korea after qualifying for BEV subsidies
item.description: Calls for tighter rules to ensure automakers do not undermine the purpose of the incentives.

item.title: Leapmotor opens orders for B03X starting at €24,900
item.description: Leapmotor has opened order books in Europe for the B03X electric compact car. Presented to European markets in January, the electric model starts at €24,900 or from €239 per month on lease. This includes an 'Urban Crossover' with up to 382km range.

item.title: Ordered
item.description: Model Y L!!. As soon as I placed my order, I received a call from Tesla Santa Monica congratulating me as “supposedly” I was the first person to place an order of the new Y L. He was more excited than I was.

item.title: California snubs Tesla in its newly passed EV incentive that favors Rivian and Lucid
item.description: California just drew a line in the EV incentive sand to put Tesla on the wrong side of it. The state recently passed a $135 million program offering first-time electric vehicle buyers a direct incentive with no application required, but the rules were written in a way that leaves Tesla at a struc...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Launches Miami Robotaxi Service, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is back in focus after launching a driverless robotaxi service in Miami and reporting second quarter deliveries of 480,126 vehicles, pairing new autonomous ambitions with solid electric vehicle volumes. See our latest analysis for Tesla. Tesla’s share price has climbed to US$419.77, ...

item.title: Tesla's Robotaxi Just Launched in Miami -- Its First City Outside Texas and California. Can It Rescue the Stock?
item.description: The Robotaxi map is growing. The question is whether the business is growing with it.

item.title: Waymo outages disrupt traffic in this major city yet again
item.description: Autonomous driving companies like Waymo, Zoox and Tesla promise a future where self-driving vehicles are the norm and traffic accidents and fatalities fall significantly because of it. But while the data on whether autonomous driving is truly safer than human driving is still inconclusive, some ...

item.title: TSLA Stock Cools Overnight After Miami Robotaxi Rally — But Morgan Stanley Sees 30,000-Vehicle Fleet By 2030
item.description: Morgan Stanley expects Tesla to launch robotaxis in Phoenix, Orlando, Tampa, and Las Vegas by year-end.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Tech Futures Slide On Samsung Earnings; SpaceX Falls Ahead Of Nasdaq-100 Inclusion
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: AI stocks rallied, with Astera, Bloom Energy and Tesla higher. But SpaceX stock dropped ahead of Nasdaq-100 inclusion.

item.title: Tesla in-cabin camera fails to prevent 60 mph naps as Wisk Aero faces lawsuit
item.description: On today’s surveillance-heavy episode of Quick Charge , it sure looks like Tesla’s in-cabin driver cam failed to stop one woman from falling asleep at the wheel, but safety and attention monitoring may not be the end game for that camera after all.

item.title: Michael Burry Rejects Claims He Was Wrong on Nvidia, Tesla and Housing Bets
item.description: The ‘Big Short’ Investor Michael Burry on Sunday disputed claims that several of his past market calls, including ones on Nvidia Corp., Tesla Inc. and another U.S. housing market crash, had proved wrong after an X account challenged his investing...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) jumped 6.2% in the afternoon session after the company expanded its Robotaxi service to Miami, building on positive momentum from its recent stronger-than-expected second-quarter delivery report.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: AI Stocks Astera, Bloom, Tesla Rebound; SpaceX Slides Ahead Of Nasdaq-100 Inclusion
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: AI stocks rallied, with Astera, Bloom Energy and Tesla higher. But SpaceX stock dropped ahead of Nasdaq-100 inclusion.

item.title: BYD’s Tesla win comes with a hidden warning
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) finally gave investors a delivery rebound. But BYD nevertheless claimed the crown back. That’s the painful part of the new worldwide electric-vehicle numbers.

item.title: Tesla Launches Battery Startup Challenge at Giga Berlin
item.description: Tesla Launches Battery Startup Challenge at Giga Berlin

item.title: SpaceX’s newest logo confirms everything about what it’s become
item.description: SpaceX made its corporate transformation official in May 2026 when Elon Musk posted on X that xAI would cease to exist as a standalone company. “xAI will be dissolved as a separate company, so it will just be SpaceXAI, the AI products from SpaceX,” he wrote. A new SpaceXAI logo was announced toda...

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up, AI Stock Tests Entry; SpaceX Tumbles As Elon Musk Makes This Boast (Live Coverage)
item.description: The Dow Jones index rose after President Trump made bullish comments. SpaceX fell on the stock market today despite an Elon Musk boast.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi App Now Tells You If Your Ride Has a Safety Driver
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi App Now Tells You If Your Ride Has a Safety Driver
